Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 
115 
LTC_PIHP_MOS 
LABEL: 
Long-Term Care Prepaid Inpatient Health Plan (PIHP) Months 
DESCRIPTION: Number of months the beneficiary was enrolled in a Long-Term Care (LTC) Prepaid Inpatient Health 
Plan (PIHP) Managed Care Plan in the calendar year. 
SHORT NAME: LTC_PIHP_MOS 
LONG NAME: LTC_PIHP_MOS 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
3 
FILE(S): 
Managed Care 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS
